title: Admin Dashboard for Managing Bookings and Availabilities

subtasks.title: Implement Dashboard Layout and Navigation
subtasks.notes: DashboardLayout.tsx is fully implemented with sidebar, header, and routing. AdminHome.tsx provides a welcome page. Navigation structure is present.

subtasks.title: Develop Bookings Management Interface
subtasks.notes: Bookings.tsx is fully implemented with CRUD, table UI, and modal form integrated with Supabase.

subtasks.title: Build Availability Management System
subtasks.notes: Calendar-style UI scaffolded in Availabilities.tsx. Local state for days/hours and toggling is working. Next: integrate with Supabase to load/save real data.

subtasks.title: Implement Data Integration and State Management
subtasks.notes: No data integration or state management logic present in admin pages yet, except for bookings and local availabilities state.

subtasks.title: Develop Access Control and Security Features
subtasks.notes: No access control or security features implemented in admin pages yet.
